title: audio_manifest.json — the mix, wired into the scene HTML
description: v1.1. The Audio / Sound Designer (Cadence) ADDED, under a bumped schema_version ('1.1'): per-track clearance fields (`license`, `attribution`, `status`, `license_code`, `license_url`, `provenance`, `source`, `share_alike`, `flag`), the signature-SFX scene anchor (`scene_no`, `at_sec`, `name`), a per-track `vo_uri`, and top-level `master_uri` / `vo_uri` / `mix`. ALL are OPTIONAL (additive) so the offline stub producer — which stamps '1.0' and omits them — still validates against this one schema (contracts.validate is NOT version-aware; it always loads the latest file, so the new fields MUST stay optional). additionalProperties stays true so older readers never break. The license+attribution guarantee for music/sfx is enforced in Cadence's engine, not the schema.

master_uri.description: schema_version 1.1 (additive): the pre-mixed documentary master (VO + ducked bed + baked accent), trimmed to total_duration_sec. The narration track's `uri` already points here (the master-bridge: the renderer muxes the narration uri); `master_uri` records it so the clean follow-up — Mason muxing `master_uri`, narration `uri` back to the pure VO — needs no further schema change. null when no master was rendered (VO-only fallback).

vo_uri.description: schema_version 1.1 (additive): the pure VO (narration.wav) the transcript describes, back-referenced so downstream can recover the un-mixed narration.

ducking.description: false = not ducked; a string names the sidechain key (e.g. "narration") the bed ducks under.

vo_uri.description: 1.1 (additive): on the narration track, the pure VO when `uri` is the master.

license.description: 1.1 (additive): the human license label. Cadence's engine refuses to ship a music/sfx track without license + attribution.

status.description: 1.1 (additive): a `placeholder` track is flagged and EXCLUDED from the master mix (never baked); `cleared`/`sourced` carry a verified license + attribution.

scene_no.description: 1.1 (additive): for the signature SFX, the storyboard scene whose signature_beat it accents.

at_sec.description: 1.1 (additive): for the signature SFX, the global cut time (its scene's first transcript segment start) the accent lands on.

mix.description: schema_version 1.1 (additive): a human-readable record of the documentary-mix discipline applied (the rule, the VO/bed/sfx gains, whether the master rendered).
